ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., action, adventure, sports) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., player, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player playing the game */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode played in the session */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game version played in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date and time the game session started */,
  "session_length" REAL /* Length of the game session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game data entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session the data belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the game data file */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the game session */,
  "jumps" INTEGER /* Number of jumps in the game session */,
  "hops" INTEGER /* Number of hops in the game session */,
  "dives" INTEGER /* Number of dives in the game session */,
  "move_toward" REAL /* Move toward metric in the game session */,
  "move_away" REAL /* Move away metric in the game session */,
  "move_up" REAL /* Move up metric in the game session */,
  "left_score" INTEGER /* Left score in the game session */,
  "right_score" INTEGER /* Right score in the game session */,
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event that generated the data */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the game event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_data_game_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replay_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replay file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the replay file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the replay file in MB */,
  "replay_type" TEXT /* Type of replay file (e.g., video, screenshot) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the replay file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replay_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session the analytics belong to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric being tracked (e.g., performance, engagement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of leaderboard (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_games" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the player joined the game */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the player left the game (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., performance, engagement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Patch notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., badge, trophy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., level completion, milestone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., graphics, sound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_settings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_settings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_modes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the game event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the game event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_event_data" (
  "event_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event data entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event */,
  "data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the game event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_event_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)
